summary: Fixed execution board generator to gate permanently blocked channels, preventing 'Do now' asset recommendations for architecturally retired channels like Reddit. This directly improves tomorrow's post-hold reentry odds.

chosen_action.summary: Fix _reddit_manual_discussion_blocked() to consult PERMANENTLY_BLOCKED dict from channel_spidering_guard instead of relying solely on transient runtime execution status (12h window). Added permanent-block gate that short-circuits before any transient checks.

why_this_action.summary: The execution board was recommending 'Do now' Reddit discussion handoff assets despite Reddit being architecturally retired (IP-blocked at Hetzner, Tor-blocked, retired 2026-05-28). The _reddit_manual_discussion_blocked() function only checked transient runtime execution status with a 12h window. If execution status was stale (older than 12h), Reddit assets leaked through as 'Do now' recommendations. This is the third instance of blocked-channel leakage into action recommendations (preceded by Apollo Cloudflare blindspot on May 26 and Reddit metadata extraction on May 24). Per three-strikes rule, escalated to framework repair.
shared_findings_used: outcome_execution_board_latest.md — board recommending Reddit handoff despite permanent block

execution.summary: Added PERMANENTLY_BLOCKED import and permanent-block gate to _reddit_manual_discussion_blocked(). Also wrote channel_blocked/ stop files for all 6 permanently blocked channels (reddit, dev.to, hackernews, lobsters, smtp-outreach, comparison_backlink) that were missing stop files. Verified fix: _reddit_manual_discussion_blocked() returns True, _reddit_discussion_asset_waiting_for_execution() returns None, execution board no longer contains 'Manual community discussion asset'.

verification.proof_asset_gap: All ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md priority A-D blog assets now exist. Remaining structural bottleneck is Google indexation at 0/80 pages.

next_actions: Post-hold rerun at 2026-05-31T00:00:00 should now produce a truthful execution board without permanently blocked channel leaks
Google indexation remains at 0 — no action possible without Google recrawl. IndexNow already pinged 10x today (2026-05-30).
All ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md priority content assets exist — first-task guide, good-vs-bad guide, overnight walkthrough, verification checklist, spec-driven guide.
